ctaText: Give your child a smarter way to learn with NeoLearn

scenes.title: Fractions Made Simple
scenes.subtitle: A clear and easy explanation for young learners
scenes.voiceover: Today we will learn fractions in a very simple and easy way.

scenes.title: What Does a Fraction Mean?
scenes.subtitle: Fractions show equal parts of one whole object
scenes.voiceover: A fraction tells us how many equal parts we take from a whole.

scenes.title: Pizza Example
scenes.subtitle: A real-life way to understand it quickly
scenes.voiceover: If a pizza is cut into four equal parts and you take one part, that is one by four.

scenes.title: Quick Recap
scenes.subtitle: Remember this simple idea
scenes.voiceover: Fractions are easy when the whole is divided into equal parts.
